title: Kashmir Tour Package
description: Starting Price: ₹22,000 – ₹30,000 per person (approx.) depending on hotel category and season.
inclusions:
Hotel / Houseboat stay

Breakfast & Dinner

Private cab for sightseeing

Airport pickup & drop

Shikara ride on Dal Lake
exclusions:
Flights / train tickets

Gondola tickets in Gulmarg

Pony rides & personal expenses
highlights:
Best Time to Visit Kashmir:

🌸 March–May (flowers & pleasant weather)

🌿 June–August (green valleys)

❄️ December–February (snowfall)

itinerary.title: Arrival in Srinagar
itinerary.description: Pickup from airport. Visit Dal Lake and enjoy Shikara Ride. Explore Mughal Gardens. Night stay in Houseboat / Hotel.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Gulmarg
itinerary.description: Drive to Gulmarg (snow destination). Gondola cable car ride. Snow activities like skiing. Return to Srinagar hotel.

itinerary.title: Srinagar to Pahalgam
itinerary.description: Scenic drive to Pahalgam. Visit Betaab Valley and Lidder River. Horse riding and local sightseeing. Night stay in Pahalgam.

itinerary.title: Pahalgam to Sonamarg
itinerary.description: Visit glaciers and snow points. Photography and sightseeing. Return to Srinagar.

itinerary.title: Srinagar Local Sightseeing
itinerary.description: Shalimar Bagh. Nishat Bagh. Local markets and Kashmiri handicrafts.

faq.question: What is the best time to visit Kashmir?
faq.answer:
The best time to visit Kashmir Valley depends on your preference:

🌸 March – May: Spring season with flowers and pleasant weather.

🌿 June – August: Perfect for sightseeing and family trips.

❄️ December – February: Ideal for snowfall and winter sports.

faq.question: How many days are enough for a Kashmir trip?
faq.answer: A 5 to 7 days trip is ideal to explore major places like Srinagar, Gulmarg, Pahalgam, and Sonamarg.

faq.question: Is Kashmir safe for tourists?
faq.answer: Yes, Kashmir is generally safe for tourists. Popular tourist areas like Srinagar, Gulmarg, and Pahalgam are regularly visited by travelers from India and abroad.

images.caption: Driving through the lush valleys of Kashmir

title: Kerala Tour Package

Airport pickup & drop
exclusions:
Flights / train tickets

Personal expenses
highlights: Kerala Tour Itinerary (5 Nights / 6 Days)

itinerary.title: Day 1 – Arrival in Kochi
itinerary.description:
Arrival at Kochi Airport

Visit Fort Kochi

See Chinese Fishing Nets & local markets

Overnight stay in Kochi

itinerary.title: Kochi → Munnar
itinerary.description:
Drive to Munnar (famous for tea gardens)

Visit waterfalls and scenic viewpoints

Evening free for local sightseeing

Overnight stay in Munnar

itinerary.description:
Visit Eravikulam National Park

Tea Museum visit

Photo points and tea plantations

faq.question: What is the best time to visit Kerala?
faq.answer: The best time to visit Kerala is from October to March, when the weather is pleasant and ideal for sightseeing.

faq.question: How many days are enough for a Kerala trip?
faq.answer: A 5 to 7 days tour is ideal to explore major destinations like Munnar, Alleppey, Thekkady, and Kochi.
